queries.sql: SELECT p.id AS p_id, COUNT(pipe.id) AS total_pipelines, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_p_type FROM gl_pipeline AS pipe INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((pipe.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = {type_e0:String})) INNER JOIN gl_projects AS p ON (e0.target_id = p.id) WHERE ((startsWith(pipe.traversal_path, {p2:String}) AND startsWith(p.traversal_path, {p3:String})) AND pipe.status IN ({p4:String}, {p5:String})) GROUP BY p.id LIMIT 20
queries.final_sql: SELECT p.id AS p_id, COUNT(pipe.id) AS total_pipelines, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, 'Project' AS _gkg_p_type FROM gl_pipeline AS pipe INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((pipe.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = 'IN_PROJECT')) INNER JOIN gl_projects AS p ON (e0.target_id = p.id) WHERE ((startsWith(pipe.traversal_path, '1/77/78/79/81/') AND startsWith(p.traversal_path, '1/77/78/79/81/')) AND pipe.status IN ('success', 'failed')) GROUP BY p.id LIMIT 20

queries.sql: SELECT u.id AS u_id, u.id AS _gkg_u_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_u_type FROM gl_users AS u WHERE u.user_type IN ({p1:String}, {p2:String}, {p3:String}) ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT 30

queries.sql: WITH RECURSIVE paths AS (SELECT start.id AS node_id, array(start.id) AS path_ids, array(tuple(start.id, {p0:String})) AS path, arrayResize(array(tuple({p1:String}, {p2:Int64}, {p3:String}, {p4:Int64}, {p5:String})), {p6:Int64}) AS edges, {p7:Int64} AS depth FROM gl_projects AS start WHERE (startsWith(start.traversal_path, {p8:String}) AND (start.id = {p9:Int64})) UNION ALL SELECT e.target_id AS node_id, arrayConcat(p.path_ids, array(e.target_id)) AS path_ids, arrayConcat(p.path, array(tuple(e.target_id, e.target_kind))) AS path, arrayConcat(p.edges, array(tuple(e.relationship_kind, e.source_id, e.source_kind, e.target_id, e.target_kind))) AS edges, (p.depth + {p10:Int64}) AS depth FROM paths AS p INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e ON (p.node_id = e.source_id) WHERE (((p.depth < {p11:Int64}) AND (NOT has(p.path_ids, e.target_id))) AND (NOT has(array({p12:Int64}), p.node_id))) UNION ALL SELECT e.source_id AS node_id, arrayConcat(p.path_ids, array(e.source_id)) AS path_ids, arrayConcat(p.path, array(tuple(e.source_id, e.source_kind))) AS path, arrayConcat(p.edges, array(tuple(e.relationship_kind, e.source_id, e.source_kind, e.target_id, e.target_kind))) AS edges, (p.depth + {p13:Int64}) AS depth FROM paths AS p INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e ON (p.node_id = e.target_id) WHERE (((p.depth < {p14:Int64}) AND (NOT has(p.path_ids, e.source_id))) AND (NOT has(array({p15:Int64}), p.node_id))) LIMIT 1000) SELECT paths.path AS _gkg_path, paths.edges AS _gkg_edges, paths.depth AS depth FROM paths AS paths INNER JOIN gl_projects AS end ON (paths.node_id = end.id) WHERE (startsWith(end.traversal_path, {p16:String}) AND (end.id = {p17:Int64})) ORDER BY paths.depth ASC LIMIT 30
queries.final_sql: WITH RECURSIVE paths AS (SELECT start.id AS node_id, array(start.id) AS path_ids, array(tuple(start.id, 'Project')) AS path, arrayResize(array(tuple('', 0, '', 0, '')), 0) AS edges, 0 AS depth FROM gl_projects AS start WHERE (startsWith(start.traversal_path, '1/272/') AND (start.id = 12682)) UNION ALL SELECT e.target_id AS node_id, arrayConcat(p.path_ids, array(e.target_id)) AS path_ids, arrayConcat(p.path, array(tuple(e.target_id, e.target_kind))) AS path, arrayConcat(p.edges, array(tuple(e.relationship_kind, e.source_id, e.source_kind, e.target_id, e.target_kind))) AS edges, (p.depth + 1) AS depth FROM paths AS p INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e ON (p.node_id = e.source_id) WHERE (((p.depth < 3) AND (NOT has(p.path_ids, e.target_id))) AND (NOT has(array(12725), p.node_id))) UNION ALL SELECT e.source_id AS node_id, arrayConcat(p.path_ids, array(e.source_id)) AS path_ids, arrayConcat(p.path, array(tuple(e.source_id, e.source_kind))) AS path, arrayConcat(p.edges, array(tuple(e.relationship_kind, e.source_id, e.source_kind, e.target_id, e.target_kind))) AS edges, (p.depth + 1) AS depth FROM paths AS p INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e ON (p.node_id = e.target_id) WHERE (((p.depth < 3) AND (NOT has(p.path_ids, e.source_id))) AND (NOT has(array(12725), p.node_id))) LIMIT 1000) SELECT paths.path AS _gkg_path, paths.edges AS _gkg_edges, paths.depth AS depth FROM paths AS paths INNER JOIN gl_projects AS end ON (paths.node_id = end.id) WHERE (startsWith(end.traversal_path, '1/272/') AND (end.id = 12725)) ORDER BY paths.depth ASC LIMIT 30

queries.sql: SELECT p.id AS p_id, g.id AS g_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_p_type, g.id AS _gkg_g_id, {p1:String} AS _gkg_g_type FROM gl_projects AS p INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((p.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = {type_e0:String})) INNER JOIN gl_groups AS g ON (e0.target_id = g.id) WHERE ((startsWith(p.traversal_path, {p3:String}) AND startsWith(g.traversal_path, {p4:String})) AND ((p.archived = {p5:Bool}) AND (g.id = {p6:Int64}))) ORDER BY p.last_activity_at DESC LIMIT 30
queries.final_sql: SELECT p.id AS p_id, g.id AS g_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, 'Project' AS _gkg_p_type, g.id AS _gkg_g_id, 'Group' AS _gkg_g_type FROM gl_projects AS p INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((p.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = 'IN_GROUP')) INNER JOIN gl_groups AS g ON (e0.target_id = g.id) WHERE ((startsWith(p.traversal_path, '1/272/273/277/279/') AND startsWith(g.traversal_path, '1/272/273/277/279/')) AND ((p.archived = 0) AND (g.id = 279))) ORDER BY p.last_activity_at DESC LIMIT 30

queries.query_name: Unresolved high-severity vulns by report type
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(v.id) AS vuln_count FROM gl_vulnerability AS v WHERE (startsWith(v.traversal_path, {p0:String}) AND (v.severity IN ({p1:String}, {p2:String}) AND v.state IN ({p3:String}, {p4:String}))) LIMIT 10
queries.final_sql: SELECT COUNT(v.id) AS vuln_count FROM gl_vulnerability AS v WHERE (startsWith(v.traversal_path, '1/47/55/59/60/') AND (v.severity IN ('high', 'critical') AND v.state IN ('detected', 'confirmed'))) LIMIT 10

queries.sql: SELECT pipe.id AS pipe_id, p.id AS p_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, pipe.id AS _gkg_pipe_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_pipe_type, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, {p1:String} AS _gkg_p_type FROM gl_pipeline AS pipe INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((pipe.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = {type_e0:String})) INNER JOIN gl_projects AS p ON (e0.target_id = p.id) WHERE ((startsWith(pipe.traversal_path, {p3:String}) AND startsWith(p.traversal_path, {p4:String})) AND (pipe.status = {p5:String})) ORDER BY pipe.created_at DESC LIMIT 30
queries.final_sql: SELECT pipe.id AS pipe_id, p.id AS p_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, pipe.id AS _gkg_pipe_id, 'Pipeline' AS _gkg_pipe_type, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, 'Project' AS _gkg_p_type FROM gl_pipeline AS pipe INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((pipe.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = 'IN_PROJECT')) INNER JOIN gl_projects AS p ON (e0.target_id = p.id) WHERE ((startsWith(pipe.traversal_path, '1/122/123/') AND startsWith(p.traversal_path, '1/122/123/')) AND (pipe.status = 'failed')) ORDER BY pipe.created_at DESC LIMIT 30

queries.sql: SELECT wi.id AS wi_id, p.id AS p_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, wi.id AS _gkg_wi_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_wi_type, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, {p1:String} AS _gkg_p_type FROM gl_work_items AS wi INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((wi.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = {type_e0:String})) INNER JOIN gl_projects AS p ON (e0.target_id = p.id) WHERE ((startsWith(wi.traversal_path, {p3:String}) AND startsWith(p.traversal_path, {p4:String})) AND ((wi.state = {p5:String}) AND (wi.confidential = {p6:Bool}))) LIMIT 20
queries.final_sql: SELECT wi.id AS wi_id, p.id AS p_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, wi.id AS _gkg_wi_id, 'WorkItem' AS _gkg_wi_type, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, 'Project' AS _gkg_p_type FROM gl_work_items AS wi INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((wi.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = 'IN_PROJECT')) INNER JOIN gl_projects AS p ON (e0.target_id = p.id) WHERE ((startsWith(wi.traversal_path, '1/197/205/206/208/') AND startsWith(p.traversal_path, '1/197/205/206/208/')) AND ((wi.state = 'opened') AND (wi.confidential = 1))) LIMIT 20

queries.sql: SELECT v.id AS v_id, p.id AS p_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, v.id AS _gkg_v_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_v_type, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, {p1:String} AS _gkg_p_type FROM gl_vulnerability AS v INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((v.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = {type_e0:String})) INNER JOIN gl_projects AS p ON (e0.target_id = p.id) WHERE ((startsWith(v.traversal_path, {p3:String}) AND startsWith(p.traversal_path, {p4:String})) AND ((v.state = {p5:String}) AND (v.severity = {p6:String}))) ORDER BY v.detected_at DESC LIMIT 30
queries.final_sql: SELECT v.id AS v_id, p.id AS p_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, v.id AS _gkg_v_id, 'Vulnerability' AS _gkg_v_type, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, 'Project' AS _gkg_p_type FROM gl_vulnerability AS v INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((v.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = 'IN_PROJECT')) INNER JOIN gl_projects AS p ON (e0.target_id = p.id) WHERE ((startsWith(v.traversal_path, '1/2/10/11/12/') AND startsWith(p.traversal_path, '1/2/10/11/12/')) AND ((v.state = 'detected') AND (v.severity = 'critical'))) ORDER BY v.detected_at DESC LIMIT 30

queries.sql: SELECT note.id AS note_id, author.id AS author_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, note.id AS _gkg_note_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_note_type, author.id AS _gkg_author_id, {p1:String} AS _gkg_author_type FROM gl_users AS author INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((author.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = {type_e0:String})) INNER JOIN gl_notes AS note ON (e0.target_id = note.id) WHERE (startsWith(note.traversal_path, {p3:String}) AND (((note.system = {p4:Bool}) AND (note.noteable_type = {p5:String})) AND (author.id = {p6:Int64}))) ORDER BY note.created_at DESC LIMIT 30
queries.final_sql: SELECT note.id AS note_id, author.id AS author_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, note.id AS _gkg_note_id, 'Note' AS _gkg_note_type, author.id AS _gkg_author_id, 'User' AS _gkg_author_type FROM gl_users AS author INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((author.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = 'AUTHORED')) INNER JOIN gl_notes AS note ON (e0.target_id = note.id) WHERE (startsWith(note.traversal_path, '1/32/33/34/35/') AND (((note.system = 0) AND (note.noteable_type = 'MergeRequest')) AND (author.id = 654))) ORDER BY note.created_at DESC LIMIT 30

queries.sql: SELECT pipe.id AS pipe_id, mr.id AS mr_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, pipe.id AS _gkg_pipe_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_pipe_type, mr.id AS _gkg_mr_id, {p1:String} AS _gkg_mr_type FROM gl_merge_requests AS mr INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((mr.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = {type_e0:String})) INNER JOIN gl_pipeline AS pipe ON (e0.target_id = pipe.id) WHERE ((startsWith(mr.traversal_path, {p3:String}) AND startsWith(pipe.traversal_path, {p4:String})) AND ((pipe.source = {p5:String}) AND (mr.id = {p6:Int64}))) ORDER BY pipe.created_at DESC LIMIT 10

queries.query_name: Open merge requests in a project
queries.sql: SELECT mr.id AS mr_id, p.id AS p_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, mr.id AS _gkg_mr_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_mr_type, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, {p1:String} AS _gkg_p_type FROM gl_merge_requests AS mr INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((mr.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = {type_e0:String})) INNER JOIN gl_projects AS p ON (e0.target_id = p.id) WHERE ((startsWith(mr.traversal_path, {p3:String}) AND startsWith(p.traversal_path, {p4:String})) AND ((mr.state = {p5:String}) AND (p.id = {p6:Int64}))) ORDER BY mr.created_at DESC LIMIT 25

queries.query_name: MRs merged by a specific user
queries.sql: SELECT mr.id AS mr_id, merger.id AS merger_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, mr.id AS _gkg_mr_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_mr_type, merger.id AS _gkg_merger_id, {p1:String} AS _gkg_merger_type FROM gl_merge_requests AS mr INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((mr.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = {type_e0:String})) INNER JOIN gl_users AS merger ON (e0.target_id = merger.id) WHERE (startsWith(mr.traversal_path, {p3:String}) AND ((mr.state = {p4:String}) AND (merger.id = {p5:Int64}))) ORDER BY mr.updated_at DESC LIMIT 30

queries.sql: SELECT p.id AS p_id, COUNT(mr.id) AS mr_count, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_p_type FROM gl_merge_requests AS mr INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((mr.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = {type_e0:String})) INNER JOIN gl_projects AS p ON (e0.target_id = p.id) WHERE (startsWith(mr.traversal_path, {p2:String}) AND startsWith(p.traversal_path, {p3:String})) GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY COUNT(mr.id) DESC LIMIT 10
queries.final_sql: SELECT p.id AS p_id, COUNT(mr.id) AS mr_count, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, 'Project' AS _gkg_p_type FROM gl_merge_requests AS mr INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((mr.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = 'IN_PROJECT')) INNER JOIN gl_projects AS p ON (e0.target_id = p.id) WHERE (startsWith(mr.traversal_path, '1/227/228/229/231/') AND startsWith(p.traversal_path, '1/227/228/229/231/')) GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY COUNT(mr.id) DESC LIMIT 10

queries.sql: SELECT p.id AS p_id, COUNT(reviewer.id) AS reviewer_count, p.id AS _gkg_p_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_p_type FROM gl_merge_requests AS mr INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((mr.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = {type_e0:String})) INNER JOIN gl_users AS reviewer ON (e0.target_id = reviewer.id) INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e1 ON ((mr.id = e1.source_id) AND (e1.relationship_kind = {type_e1:String})) INNER JOIN gl_projects AS p ON (e1.target_id = p.id) WHERE (startsWith(mr.traversal_path, {p3:String}) AND startsWith(p.traversal_path, {p4:String})) GROUP BY p.id LIMIT 15

queries.query_name: High weight work items assigned to user
queries.sql: SELECT wi.id AS wi_id, assignee.id AS assignee_id, e0.relationship_kind AS e0_type, e0.source_id AS e0_src, e0.source_kind AS e0_src_type, e0.target_id AS e0_dst, e0.target_kind AS e0_dst_type, wi.id AS _gkg_wi_id, {p0:String} AS _gkg_wi_type, assignee.id AS _gkg_assignee_id, {p1:String} AS _gkg_assignee_type FROM gl_work_items AS wi INNER JOIN gl_edges AS e0 ON ((wi.id = e0.source_id) AND (e0.relationship_kind = {type_e0:String})) INNER JOIN gl_users AS assignee ON (e0.target_id = assignee.id) WHERE (startsWith(wi.traversal_path, {p3:String}) AND (((wi.weight >= {p4:Int64}) AND (wi.state = {p5:String})) AND (assignee.id = {p6:Int64}))) LIMIT 20
